nasb.text: “Speak to Aaron and say to him, ‘When you mount the lamps, the seven lamps will give light in the front of the lampstand.’ ”

esv.text: “Speak to Aaron and say to him, When you set up the lamps, the seven lamps shall give light in front of the lampstand.”

cnv.text: “你要告訴亞倫：‘你點燈的時候，七盞燈都要照向燈臺的前面。’”

ccb.text: “你告诉亚伦，安放灯的时候，七盏灯都要照向灯台的前面。”
